DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.StickyWildFeature1: A Wild symbol is positioned in the third column and third row of the reels and will remain there for every round.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature1: During any spin, winning symbols that explode will be accumulated in the collection bar above the reels.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature2: Once a certain amount of winning symbols have been collected, a feature will be triggered during the round with no winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature3: The collection bar will reset to zero at the start of any spin.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature4: The maximum number of winning symbols that can be collected in a spin is 80.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature5: All features triggered by the collection bar can only be triggered once in a spin.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCollectionBarFeature6: If there are 2 or more features waiting to be triggered, only one feature will be triggered during the round with no winning combination. The next feature can only be triggered during the next round with no winning combination. The features will be triggered in the following order: Earth Dragon Feature, Water Dragon Feature, Fire Dragon Feature, Dragon Queen Feature.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyEarthDragonFeature1: During any spin, if 10 or more winning symbols are collected, the Earth Dragon Feature is triggered during the round with no winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyEarthDragonFeature2: During the Earth Dragon Feature, all low paying symbols will be removed from the reels.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWaterDragonFeature1: During any spin, if 30 or more winning symbols are collected, the Water Dragon Feature is triggered during the round with no winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWaterDragonFeature2: During the Water Dragon Feature, a randomly chosen symbol (either Earth Dragon symbol, Water Dragon symbol, Fire Dragon symbol or Dragon Eye symbol) will be added vertically to the second column of the reels and another randomly chosen symbol (either Earth Dragon symbol, Water Dragon symbol, Fire Dragon symbol or Dragon Eye symbol) will be added vertically to the fourth column of the reels.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFireDragonFeature1: During any spin, if 55 or more winning symbols are collected, the Fire Dragon Feature is triggered during the round with no winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFireDragonFeature2: During the Fire Dragon Feature, a Wild symbol will be added to random positions on reel 1, 2, 4 and 5 respectively.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDragonQueenFeature1: During any spin, if 80 winning symbols are collected, the Dragon Queen Feature is triggered during the round with no winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDragonQueenFeature2: At the start of the Dragon Queen Feature, a Wild symbol will be added to the four corners of the reels respectively and will remain there until the end of the spin.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.BodyDragonQueenFeature3: During the Dragon Queen Feature, all low paying symbols will be transformed into high paying symbols.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.MaximumWinFeature1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.MaximumWinFeature2: If the total win in the main game or the Bonus Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the Paytable multiplied by bet size and bet multiplier.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
DragonHatch2PayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols.

DragonHatch2Rules.GeneralRules1: Dragon Hatch 2 is a 5 by 5 arrangement of symbols video slot featuring various features that help in cascading more wins.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.5 to 50.
